response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates strong general software engineering capabilities, proven ability to ship products across multiple platforms, and some exposure to infrastructure systems, he falls significantly short on the core technical requirements. Most critically, he has approximately 6 months of C++ experience against an 8-year requirement, and his large-scale infrastructure expertise is limited to roughly 2 years at Dunnhumby. His background as a versatile full-stack generalist across many languages and domains does not align with the specialized depth in cloud compute platforms, distributed systems, and C++ systems programming that this technical leadership role demands.
strengths: Extensive shipping experience across 19+ years in diverse domains (web, mobile, desktop, embedded, GIS) with multiple product launches reaching significant scale
Demonstrated technical leadership in senior and staff roles with experience mentoring through workshops, courses, and open-source project stewardship
Committed to testing practices and code quality; organized testing dojos and created Selenium training covering OOP, TDD, and CI/CD
concerns: Critical gap in C++ programming: only 6 months at National Instruments versus 8-year requirement; primary expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, D, and Java

Large-scale infrastructure and cloud compute expertise severely limited; only Dunnhumby role shows high-throughput systems work, with minimal evidence of cloud architecture ownership or distributed systems depth
Generalist full-stack profile across disparate technologies and domains, not the specialized infrastructure systems expertise and cloud platform leadership required for this role

key_factors.factor: Large-scale cloud infrastructure and distributed systems experience
Proven technical leadership and mentoring capability
